<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This project is a React-based AST visualizer. The app loads an AST JSON file and displays it as an interactive, collapsible tree. Use modern React tree libraries for visualization. Focus on usability and clarity for exploring AST node details.
